text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Taiki! You ready?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm ready when you are!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Then let's get that gate open!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: On your marks... Get set...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and Taiki Shuttle both take off
running down the road out in front of the dorms.
What are those two up to?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Phew! Perfect! That should do the trick!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! No problemo! Dinner's gonna be luxurious
tonight!
choice_data_list: What are you two up to?
What are you two up to?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Well see, there's an event goin' on
right now at a popular cafe for their new pizza!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They're only 500 yen! And not just the small
ones—the extra-large ones too! First come, first
served! Plus, there's no limit to how many you can
buy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why me and El are trainin' together. We're
gonna treat ourselves to some extra-larges!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They're so big, it's gonna take both of us just to
carry them back!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can come with if you want, Trainer! What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If the three of us go, we can carry way more in
one trip!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now that's thinkin'! Let's have ourselves a lil' extra-large pizza shindig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can grasp the situation, the two take me
with them to the cafe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're here! The place is over there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! It sure is packed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's way more people than I thought! We
should've made a plan!
choice_data_list: Just stroll up like you own the place!
Look for a gap in the crowd!
Look for a gap in the crowd!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's way more people than I thought! We
should've made a plan!
choice_data_list: Just stroll up like you own the place!
Look for a gap in the crowd!
Look for a gap in the crowd!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Like we own the place? Oh, I see! It's all about
attitude!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! That sounds kinda fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No hay problema! I'm El Condor Pasa! Hella
strong, hella fast, hella intimidating!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm goin' all out too! Hehe, I'm so ready!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: They're about to open! Let's go, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's nab us a big'un!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking care not to bump into anyone, we move
forward like we belong at the front. A bit later...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Got one! Extra-large, babyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her powerful voice resonates through the air.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You want us to slip through the gaps?! I see! So
this needs some finesse!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I think you're exactly right!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We gotta be extra careful! It could be bad if we
were to accidentally bump into anyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I go all out when I'm runnin' at practice, but we
can't push our way through here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Understood, Trainer! Leave it to me! I'm the
world's strongest, after all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure it gets done! Let's go, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm all set too! Time to nab us a big ol' pizza!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa makes her way forward, carefully
weaving her way through the crowd in pursuit of
pizza!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Got one! Extra-large, babyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like El Condor Pasa may have learned
something while weaving skillfully through the
crowd to get pizza.
